methods.description: Multivariate analyses were conducted to compare the Deep Skull with other Pleistocene samples using 18 variables. The analyses included principal coordinates analysis and UPGMA cluster analysis to identify phenetic relationships among samples.

steps.description: All data were log-transformed prior to analysis.
We performed principal coordinates analysis using the software PAST Version 3.11.
steps.searchable_summary: perform principal coordinates analysis using PAST software

steps.description: We performed UPGMA cluster analysis employing the Gower distance using the software PAST Version 3.11.
steps.searchable_summary: perform UPGMA cluster analysis using Gower distance in PAST software
